title: Symbol call graph goldset and promotion benchmark
goal: Measure precision, unresolved honesty, context compression and coding-agent task quality before any default promotion.

acceptance.assertion: A fixed multilingual-aware but Python-scored goldset covers direct calls, aliases, recursion, methods, shadowing, callbacks, decorators, defaults, dynamic dispatch and negative cases.
The evaluation reports S1 precision, recall, false-positive classes, unresolved share, bytes, build time, context paths, tool calls and agent task outcomes.
Default promotion remains false unless target recall is equal or better, S1 precision meets the registered threshold and no central task category regresses.

metadata.source_request: User requested all Symbol Call Graph work to be registered and implemented.
